zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Goushill於1294年5月12日出生在英國史洛普爾廷頓時，她的父親Ralph de Goushill21歲，母親Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo17歲。她於大約1312年與Philip Despenser在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾格爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1349年7月29日在英國享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Goushill于1294年5月12日出生在英国史洛普爾廷頓时，她的父亲Ralph de Goushill21岁，母亲Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo17岁。她于大约1312年与Philip Despenser在英国英格兰林可爾史爾格爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1349年7月29日在英国享年55岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Goushill was born on 12 May 1294, in Whittington, Shropshire, England, her father, Ralph de Goushill, was 21 and her mother, Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo, was 17. She married Philip Despenser about 1312, in Goxhill, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 29 July 1349, in England, at the age of 55, and was buried in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Goushill est née le 12 mai 1294, à Whittington, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Goushill, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Philip Despenser environ 1312, à Goxhill, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 29 juillet 1349, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Goushill am 12. Mai 1294 in Whittington, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph de Goushill 21 und ihre Mutter Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo 17. Sie hat um 1312 in Goxhill, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Philip Despenser geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 29. Juli 1349 im Alter von 55 Jahren in England und wurde in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Goushill è nata il il 12 maggio 1294 nel Whittington, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Ralph de Goushill, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Philip Despenser circa 1312, nel Goxhill, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 29 luglio 1349, nel England, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Goushillが1294年5月12日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィッティントンで生まれた時，父Ralph de Goushillは21歳，母Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hooは17歳であった。約1312年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアゴクスヒルでPhilip Despenserと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1349年7月29日にイギリスで55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Goushill(이)가 1294년 5월 12일 영국 슈럽실르 휘틴그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph de Goushill(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1312년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 고스힐에서 Philip Despenser(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1349년 7월 29일 영국에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.12 May 1294–29 July 1349: 12 de maio de 1294–29 de julho de 1349
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Goushill nasceu em 12 de maio de 1294, em Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de Goushill, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Philip Despenser aproximadamente 1312, em Goxhill, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 29 de julho de 1349, em Inglaterra, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Goushill родилась 12 мая 1294 г. в местности уиттингтон, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph de Goushill было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philip Despenser около 1312 г. в местности гоксхилл, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 29 июля 1349 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.12 May 1294–29 July 1349: 12 de mayo de 1294–29 de julio de 1349
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Goushill nació el 12 de mayo de 1294, en Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph de Goushill, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Philip Despenser aproximadamente 1312, en Goxhill, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 29 de julio de 1349, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
